'''Trinkatta Starships''' was a company that specialized in the production of a variety of [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Established by the [[Kloodavian]] businessman, [[Boll Trinkatta]], the company was headquartered in the city of [[Calamar]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]. A short time before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], Trinkatta Starships was contracted with the construction of fifty [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|vulture droid]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] to be equipped with [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]]. This order proved highly suspicious with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] due to the expansion of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], and they contacted the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to investigate who had placed the order. The council sent the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] to search the company's headquarters. Unfortunately, she disappeared during the investigation, leaving the identity of the mystery person unknown.

It was eventually revealed that the design of the droid starfighters was implemented by the [[Xi Char/Legends|Xi Char]], who had ties to the Trade Federation. Trinkatta Starships' factory was run almost completely by droid control, and Boll Trinkatta had been unaware of the Trade Federation's ties to the project. After discovering the Xi Char's involvement, Trinkatta refused to help, trying to cancel the order. However, the order continued to be processed after [[Bartokk]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] captured Trinkatta and reprogrammed the factories' [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. When Adi Gallia had arrived, the reprogrammed droids had incapacitated her, and the Jedi Council sent a task force of four [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]—[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Noro Zak]], and [[Vel Ardox]]—to continue the investigation. The group shut down the starfighter's production, and Adi Gallia was rescued and sent to a [[Jedi chapter house/Legends|Jedi chapter house]] for recuperation. However, several of the specially equipped starfighters were commandeered by the Bartokk assassins which they planned to use against the Jedi who had foiled their plot. They eventually got their chance by attacking the Jedi task force that had been sent to the [[Corulag Academy]].

The entire operation had been orchestrated by [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], who wished for the droid starfighters to be used to take over the planet [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]]. The capture of this planet would allow the Trade Federation to control trade routes through the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] and the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]], increasing their influence for Sidious' benefit. The failure of the project had an untold effect on the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith's]] plans.
